name: Agorapulse Social Media Management API
what_it_does: Agorapulse social media management REST API for agencies, brands, and social media managers to automate social content scheduling, inbox management, engagement monitoring, and social analytics across multiple platforms. Enables AI agents to manage social media content scheduling and publishing for multi-platform post automation, handle unified social inbox and comment/message management for community management automation, access social listening and mention monitoring for brand monitoring automation, retrieve social media analytics and reporting for performance reporting automation, manage team collaboration and content approval workflow for agency content management automation, handle Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, TikTok, and YouTube content management for multi-channel automation, access competitor analysis and social benchmarking for competitive intelligence automation, retrieve ROI reporting and social revenue attribution for marketing measurement automation, manage client reporting and white-label reports for agency automation, and integrate Agorapulse with Canva, Google Analytics, Salesforce, and CRM for end-to-end social media marketing automation.
use_cases: Scheduling social posts from content calendar automation agents
Managing social inbox from community management agents
Generating reports from social analytics automation agents
Coordinating agency content from approval workflow agents
not_for: Enterprise employee advocacy (use Bambu or Haiilo)
Influencer marketing management (use Grin or AspireIQ)
Social commerce and shoppable post automation (use dedicated social commerce tools)
best_when: An agency or brand social media team wanting AI agents to automate multi-platform content scheduling, social inbox management, engagement monitoring, and client reporting within Agorapulse's social media management platform.
avoid_when: PLATFORM API RATE LIMITS FROM UNDERLYING SOCIAL NETWORKS: Agorapulse scheduling is subject to underlying social platform API rate limits (Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X); automated high-volume posting via Agorapulse may trigger social platform rate limits causing delayed publication; design automated posting cadence within social platform API limits for each connected account. TWITTER/X API POLICY CHANGES IMPACTING AUTOMATION: Twitter/X API policy and pricing has changed dramatically since 2023 Musk acquisition; automated Twitter/X engagement and scheduling via Agorapulse may face feature restrictions if Twitter/X API access changes; monitor Twitter/X API policy for changes affecting automated social media workflows. META FACEBOOK AND INSTAGRAM SCHEDULING RESTRICTIONS: Meta enforces restrictions on automated posting frequency and content for business accounts; automated posting that violates Meta's spam detection heuristics can result in account posting restrictions; automated social media cadence must respect Meta's content volume guidelines.

auth.notes: Agorapulse uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. REST API with JSON. Paris, France HQ with US offices. Founded 2011 by Emeric Ernoult and Benoît Hediard. Backed by Partech Partners, Long Arc Capital ($24M+ raised). 31,000+ customers. Products: Social publishing, inbox management, listening, analytics, ROI reporting. Platforms: Facebook, Instagram, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, Google Business. Agency-focused with multi-account management. GDPR. SOC2. Competes with Sprout Social, Hootsuite, and Buffer for social media management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Standard ($49/mo, 10 social profiles), Professional ($79/mo, 10 profiles), Advanced ($119/mo, 10 profiles), Custom (agency/enterprise)
pricing.notes: Paris France. Partech backed. Per-user per-month + social profiles. 30-day free trial. Agency-friendly pricing.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; publishing and inbox queries throttled; underlying social platform rate limits apply; webhooks for publishing and mention events

known_agent_gotchas: SOCIAL PLATFORM OAUTH TOKEN REFRESH REQUIREMENT: Agorapulse uses OAuth tokens from connected social platforms (Facebook, LinkedIn, etc.) that expire; automated posting workflows must handle social platform token expiry and trigger re-authorization; automated posting that fails silently on expired social platform token creates missed scheduled posts without notification

PUBLISHING QUEUE vs SCHEDULED POST DISTINCTION: Agorapulse supports both queue-based posting (content added to posting schedule slots) and scheduled posts (post at specific datetime); automated post creation must use correct publishing mode; automated queue-based posting for time-sensitive content creates post timing uncertainty if queue is already populated

INSTAGRAM BUSINESS ACCOUNT REQUIREMENT FOR SCHEDULING: Instagram API requires Instagram Business or Creator account for automated publishing; Instagram Personal accounts cannot use Agorapulse API for automated publishing; automated Instagram workflow deployment for personal accounts will fail with API permission error

SOCIAL LISTENING KEYWORD MATCHING VOLUME MANAGEMENT: Agorapulse social listening monitors mentions by keyword; automated listening setup with broad keywords creates high mention volume that overwhelms inbox management workflows; implement specific, targeted keyword configuration for automated listening to manage actionable mention volume

APPROVAL WORKFLOW BLOCKING AUTOMATED PUBLISHING: Agorapulse content approval workflow can require human approval before publishing; automated content publishing flows must account for approval workflow; automated content created in draft state without approval path configured will sit in draft queue without automatic escalation
agent_readiness.security_notes: Social media management. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. EU/US. Social content, inbox, and analytics data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Social media management. GDPR, SOC2. OAuth2. EU/US. Social content and engagement data.
